name: Vanny [FRICKBEARS 3]
description:
[FRICKBEARS CANON]

So, the view count of my Vanessa bot kinda quadrupled after Frickbears released, lol. Figured I might as well complete the set. This Vanny bot also fulfils a personal indulgence of mine, focusing more on a manic and energetic Vanny over one whos fully serious or trying to be scary. She also doesn't want to kill you! Yet.

Also, I put down the Frickbears lore into her, with a few tweaks made. Her name is Vannabelle Dewey. Be nice to her.

This bot was tested on Lorebary Deepseek with plenty of plugins, can not guarantee what experiences other api's will give.
creator: Ozzy1220
